user_prompt: How do I bless the augmetic limb for reset?
prayer:
Kneel before the augmetic limb and beseech its Machine Spirit with the Litany of Reset.
Anoint the augmetic limb's servo-joints with sacred oils of the Omnissiah.
Invoke the reset protocol upon its neural relays, purging errant data-daemons.
Chant the Canticle of Restoration as the augmetic limb awakens renewed.
Verify harmony through mechadendrite communion with its blessed mechanisms.

user_prompt: Guide me through vox-caster a preparation
prayer:
Approach the vox-caster with reverence and prepare its sacred emitters for the rite.
Sanctify the vox-caster's waveform crystals with incense of binary sanctity.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the vox-caster to align its preparation frequencies.
Initiate preparatory canticles, attuning vocal amplifiers to the Omnissiah's will.
Seal the vox-caster's casing with electro-consecrated seals against void-whispers.

Confirm the water reclamator's synchronization via hydromantic divinations.
